p.strong: Logical Grid: TP=8 × PP=2 × DP=4 = 64 GPUs

div.p: Total GPUs = TP × PP × DP = 8 × 2 × 4 = 64 Each GPU has coordinates: (tp_rank, pp_rank, dp_rank)

g.text: 1. TP ≤ GPUs per node (requires NVLink bandwidth)
2. PP can span nodes (point-to-point tolerates latency)

ul.li: DP = 4 (across remaining nodes) Memory per GPU: Model params / (TP × PP) Communication: TP every layer, PP every stage, DP every step

div.p: Pattern: All-Reduce (every layer) Volume: batch × seq × hidden_dim Bandwidth: NVLink ~300 GB/s Constraint: MUST be within node
Pattern: Point-to-Point Send/Recv Volume: batch × seq × hidden_dim Bandwidth: InfiniBand ~25 GB/s Constraint: Tolerates inter-node latency
Pattern: All-Reduce (once per step) Volume: model_parameters Bandwidth: InfiniBand ~25 GB/s Constraint: Amortized over step time
